message:
refactor: extract types into src/moe/ and src/inference/gguf/

- Create src/moe/types.zig with ResidentLayerWeights and stats types
- Create src/moe/mod.zig for module organization
- Create src/inference/gguf/types.zig with GGUF constants and types
- Create src/inference/gguf/mod.zig for module organization
- Update moe_metal.zig and gguf_loader.zig to import from new modules
- Maintain backward compatibility via re-exports

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+//! MoE type definitions
+//!
+//! Shared data structures used across the MoE subsystem.
+
+const std = @import("std");
+const objc = @import("../inference/metal/objc.zig");
+
+/// Resident attention weights for one transformer layer
+/// These stay in GPU VRAM permanently - no streaming needed
+pub const ResidentLayerWeights = struct {
+    // Attention projections Q/K/V/O (Q4_K quantized, ~80MB/layer)
+    attn_q: ?objc.MTLBuffer = null,
+    attn_k: ?objc.MTLBuffer = null,
+    attn_v: ?objc.MTLBuffer = null,
+    attn_o: ?objc.MTLBuffer = null,
+
+    // Layer norms (F32, ~16KB/layer - negligible)
+    attn_norm: ?objc.MTLBuffer = null,
+    ffn_norm: ?objc.MTLBuffer = null,
+
+    loaded: bool = false,
+};
+
+/// Hot cache statistics
+pub const HotCacheStats = struct {
+    hits: u64,
+    misses: u64,
+    hit_rate: f32,
+};
+
+/// Oracle prefetch statistics
+pub const OracleStats = struct {
+    hits: u64,
+    misses: u64,
+    hit_rate: f32,
+};
+
+/// Turbo mode statistics
+pub const TurboStats = struct {
+    cold_skips: u64,
+    total_calls: u64,
+    skip_rate: f32,
+};
+
+/// Shadow router statistics
+pub const ShadowRouterStats = struct {
+    predictions: u64,
+    cache_hits: u64,
+    total_prefetches: u64,
+    queue_depth: u32,
+};
+
+/// Pinned expert buffers
+pub const PinnedExpertBuffers = struct {
+    gate: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    up: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    down: objc.MTLBuffer,
+};
+
+/// Prefetched expert buffers
+pub const PrefetchedBuffers = struct {
+    gate: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    up: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    down: objc.MTLBuffer,
+};
+
+/// MoE model configuration
+pub const MoEConfig = struct {
+    n_expert: u32 = 8,
+    n_expert_used: u32 = 2,
+    n_embd: u32 = 4096,
+    n_ff: u32 = 14336,
+    n_layer: u32 = 32,
+    n_head: u32 = 32,
+    n_head_kv: u32 = 8,
+    head_dim: u32 = 128,
+};
+
+/// Maximum constants
+pub const MAX_LAYERS = 32;
+pub const MAX_EXPERTS = 8;
+pub const MAX_PINNED_EXPERTS = 4;
+pub const MAX_BATCH_SIZE = 32;

@@ -6,32 +6,22 @@
 //! - Router: GPU-accelerated top-K selection with softmax
 //! - Expert FFN: Fused gate/up/down projections with SwiGLU on GPU
 //! - Combination: GPU-accelerated weighted sum of expert outputs
+//!
+//! See also: src/moe/ for type definitions and module organization
 
 const std = @import("std");
 const objc = @import("inference/metal/objc.zig");
 const ResidentExpertCache = @import("expert_cache.zig").ResidentExpertCache;
 const DoubleBufferLoader = @import("double_buffer.zig").DoubleBufferLoader;
 const TokenBatchLoader = @import("token_batch_loader.zig").TokenBatchLoader;
+const moe_types = @import("moe/types.zig");
 
 const log = std.log.scoped(.moe_metal);
 
 const shader_source = @embedFile("inference/metal/moe_kernels.metal");

-/// These stay in GPU VRAM permanently - no streaming needed

-    // Attention projections Q/K/V/O (Q4_K quantized, ~80MB/layer)

-    attn_norm: ?objc.MTLBuffer = null,

-
-    loaded: bool = false,
-};
+// Re-export types for backward compatibility
+pub const ResidentLayerWeights = moe_types.ResidentLayerWeights;
 
 pub const MetalMoEEngine = struct {
     allocator: std.mem.Allocator,
@@ -40,19 +30,19 @@ pub const MetalMoEEngine = struct {

-    pipeline_router_logits_f16: objc.MTLComputePipelineState,  // F16 router weights (common in Mixtral Q4_K_M)

-    pipeline_dense_q8_0: objc.MTLComputePipelineState,  // Dense Q8_0 MVM for attention (K, V)
+    pipeline_expert_q8_0: objc.MTLComputePipelineState, // Q8_0 gate/up kernel
+    pipeline_down_proj_q8_0: objc.MTLComputePipelineState, // Q8_0 down projection
+    pipeline_expert_q4_k: objc.MTLComputePipelineState, // Q4_K gate/up kernel (~2x faster)

@@ -86,27 +76,27 @@ pub const MetalMoEEngine = struct {
 
     // Persistent GPU buffers (reused across operations)
     // Sized for max batch size of 32 tokens (overkill for typical 10-token speculation)
-    buf_hidden_states: objc.MTLBuffer,      // [max_batch_size, n_embd]

     kv_cache_initialized: bool,

@@ -124,20 +114,20 @@ pub const MetalMoEEngine = struct {
     // Mixtral uses same experts repeatedly (e.g., Expert 0/4 for grammar)
     // Caching top N experts avoids redundant SSD reads → 2-3x speedup
     hot_cache_enabled: bool,
-    hot_cache_max_experts: u8,  // How many experts to keep hot (e.g., 4)
-    hot_expert_hits: [8]u32,    // Hit counter per expert

     hot_expert_resident: [8]bool, // Which experts are currently in VRAM

     // Static Pinning - permanently lock top experts in RAM (mlock'd)
     // Based on profiled Zipf distribution: top 4 experts cover ~80% of calls
